entry.content: • (Anthos Multi-Cloud) Deprecated gcloud container attached clusters get-credentials. Use gcloud container fleet memberships get-credentials to get credentials for a running Attached cluster.
entry.summary: The `gcloud container attached clusters get-credentials` command is deprecated. Please use `gcloud container fleet memberships get-credentials` for managing Attached cluster credentials going forward.
entry.title: Breaking Changes: Attached Clusters Credentials Command Deprecated

entry.content: • Updated Windows bundled Python for the gcloud CLI to 3.14.5.
entry.summary: The gcloud CLI has been updated with a new bundled Python version, 3.14.5, for Windows users. This update ensures the CLI is running on the latest Python release.
entry.title: Google Cloud CLI: gcloud CLI Python update

entry.content: • Added gcloud ai tuning-jobs command group to manage Vertex AI supervised fine-tuning jobs.
entry.summary: You can now manage supervised fine-tuning jobs for AI models using the new `gcloud ai tuning-jobs` command group. This simplifies the process of working with Vertex AI tuning jobs.
entry.title: AI: Manage AI tuning jobs

entry.content:
• Updated the Java SDK to version 5.0.4 build from the open source project https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/appengine-java-standard/releases/tag/v5.0.4.
  • fixed https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/appengine-java-standard/issues/506.
entry.summary: The Java SDK for App Engine has been updated to version 5.0.4, incorporating the latest changes from the open source project. This update also addresses a previously identified issue.
entry.title: App Engine: App Engine Java SDK updated

entry.content: • Added gcloud artifacts image-streaming-cache command group to manage image streaming caches per region. This group includes create, describe, delete, and list commands.
entry.summary: New commands are available to manage image streaming caches per region. You can now create, describe, delete, and list these caches using the `gcloud artifacts image-streaming-cache` command group.
entry.title: Artifact Registry: Manage image streaming caches

entry.content:
• Promoted --unity-service-principal-application-id flag for gcloud biglake iceberg catalogs create and update to BETA, making it publicly visible.
  • Promoted BigLake catalogs and arguments for gcloud biglake iceberg catalogs to GA.
entry.summary: BigLake catalog management commands are now generally available. The `--unity-service-principal-application-id` flag for creating and updating BigLake Iceberg catalogs has been promoted to Beta.
entry.title: BigLake: BigLake catalog management now generally available

entry.content:
• Added gcloud datalineage command group to manage Cloud Data Lineage resources.
  • Added gcloud datalineage config describe and gcloud datalineage config update commands to manage Data Lineage configurations.
entry.summary: The `gcloud datalineage` command group is now available for managing Cloud Data Lineage resources. You can use `gcloud datalineage config describe` and `gcloud datalineage config update` to manage Data Lineage configurations.
entry.title: Cloud Data Lineage: Manage Cloud Data Lineage with gcloud

entry.content:
• Added support for Dataverse, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, and ServiceNow connection profiles to gcloud datastream connection-profiles create and update commands.
  • Added support for Dataverse, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, and ServiceNow streams to gcloud datastream streams create and update commands.
entry.summary: Datastream now supports Dataverse, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, and ServiceNow. You can use these new integrations with both connection profiles and stream configurations via the gcloud CLI.
entry.title: Cloud Datastream: New Datastream Integrations Available

entry.content: • Promoted --readiness_probe in gcloud run deploy and gcloud run services update to GA.
entry.summary: The `--readiness_probe` flag for Cloud Run services is now generally available. This feature allows you to control when your service is ready to receive traffic, improving application reliability and deployment stability.
entry.title: Cloud Run: Cloud Run readiness probes now generally available

entry.content: • API Keys: Updated gcloud services api-keys create and update commands' --api-target flag to accept a colon-separated list of methods inline (e.g. --api-target="service=foo,methods=m1:m2").
entry.summary: The `gcloud services api-keys` `create` and `update` commands now support inline method lists for the `--api-target` flag. This allows specifying multiple methods directly within the flag, simplifying API key configuration.
entry.title: Cloud Services: API Keys Commands Updated

entry.content: • Promoted gcloud storage batch-operations bucket-operations commands to GA.
entry.summary: We are excited to announce that the `gcloud storage batch-operations bucket-operations` commands have been promoted to General Availability. This means you can now leverage these powerful batch operations for managing your Cloud Storage buckets in production environments. This update streamlines bulk management tasks, making it easier and more efficient to handle multiple bucket operations.
entry.title: Cloud Storage: Cloud Storage Batch Operations Now Generally Available

entry.content: • Added support for creating clusters using blueprints in gcloud beta cluster-director clusters create.
entry.summary: You can now create clusters using blueprints with the `gcloud beta cluster-director clusters create` command. This simplifies the process of setting up new clusters by leveraging pre-defined configurations.
entry.title: Cluster Director: Cluster creation with blueprints

entry.content:
• Promoted --action-on-vm-failed-health-check flag to GA for gcloud compute instance-groups managed create and gcloud compute instance-groups managed update.
  • Fixed an issue where waiting for asynchronous operations would fail for certain global nested resources (like cross-site-networks wire-groups).
  • Added any-reservation-then-fail choice to --reservation-affinity flag in beta for gcloud compute instances create, gcloud compute instances bulk create, gcloud compute instance-templates create, gcloud compute instances create-with-container, and gcloud compute instance-templates create-with-container commands.
  • Promoted --include-disks and --exclude-disks flags for gcloud compute machine-images create to the BETA release track.
entry.summary: New features for managed instance groups, improved asynchronous operation handling, and enhanced reservation options are now available for Compute Engine. Additionally, machine image creation flags have reached beta.
entry.title: Compute Engine: Compute Engine updates

entry.content:
• Added --dataplane-optimization-mode flag to gcloud container clusters create to select scalability mode for Dataplane V2.
  • Deprecated None value of --release-channel flag from gcloud container clusters create and update command. Use RAPID, REGULAR, STABLE or EXTENDED instead.
entry.summary: New flag added for Dataplane V2 scalability mode selection. Release channel 'None' is deprecated; use RAPID, REGULAR, STABLE, or EXTENDED instead.
entry.title: Kubernetes Engine: Kubernetes Engine Dataplane V2 Scalability

entry.content: • Updated help text for --region flag in gcloud network-connectivity transports create to include supported regions list.
entry.summary: The help text for the --region flag in `gcloud network-connectivity transports create` has been updated. It now includes a list of supported regions for creating network connectivity transports.
entry.title: Network Connectivity: Network Connectivity Transport Regions Updated

entry.content:
• Added gcloud network-security operations command group (describe, wait, list, cancel).
  • Promoted project scoping for gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints commands (create, delete, describe, list, update) to GA.
  • Promoted gcloud network-security security-profiles wildfire-analysis commands to BETA.
  • Promoted gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints wildfire-verdict-change-requests commands to beta.
  • Promoted WildFire-related flags in gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints create command to BETA.
  • Promoted WildFire-related flags in gcloud network-security firewall-endpoints update command to BETA.
entry.summary: We've expanded network security capabilities with new operations commands and promoted several features, including firewall endpoints and WildFire analysis, to General Availability and Beta. These updates enhance your ability to manage and secure your network resources.
entry.title: Network Security: New network security features

entry.content:
• Fixed an issue where gcloud recaptcha keys create ignored --testing-score when creating Android or iOS keys.

Subscribe to these release notes at https://groups.google.com/forum/#!forum/google-cloud-sdk-announce.
entry.summary: An issue has been resolved where the `--testing-score` flag was not being applied correctly during the creation of Android or iOS Recaptcha keys using the `gcloud recaptcha keys create` command. This ensures that testing scores are now properly configured for these key types.
entry.title: Recaptcha: Recaptcha: Fix for key creation
